title: Skill manifest
description: Machine-readable manifest for a Magpie skill. Lives next to SKILL.md as manifest.yaml.

id.description: Unique skill identifier. Matches the directory name under skills/.

version.description: Semver version of the skill. Bumped independently of the framework.

risk-tier.description: Tier id from agent/taxonomy/risk-tiers.yaml. Single value, not a list.

integrations.description: Integration ids the skill requires. Subset of agent/taxonomy/integrations.yaml.

requires.description: Skill ids this skill depends on. The reconciler pulls them in even if intent excludes them.

templates.description: Template files the skill renders into the adopter workspace. Paths relative to the skill directory.

schema.description: Path to params JSON Schema, relative to the skill directory.

defaults.description: Path to safe default values, relative to the skill directory.

status.description: Skill lifecycle status. 'off' means MISSION sequencing forbids enabling it (e.g. Auto-merge today).

replaces.description: Skill ids this skill supersedes (rename or split). Used by reconciler/migrations.
